message:
Add e-process oracle for statistical query shedding

New eprocess module with EProcessConfig, EProcessOracle, and
EProcessSnapshot types for game-theoretic load shedding.

cx.rs: CxInner gains an eprocess_oracle field. New methods
set/clear_eprocess_oracle() and maybe_cancel_via_eprocess().
The checkpoint() method now consults the oracle — if
should_shed(priority) returns true, the context is cancelled
with CancelReason::Abort. This enables statistical shedding of
low-priority queries during overload without per-query configuration.

Three new tests: shedding low-priority contexts, respecting priority
thresholds, and preserving masking semantics during e-process
cancellation.

Formatting cleanup in ecs.rs, record.rs, value.rs (import reordering,
rustfmt compliance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
